expectations.text: Routed to pipeline diagram (not deployment, not sequence)
`@startuml` is present with a non-placeholder name (not `pipeline-diagram`)
`left to right direction` is the layout directive
At least one `queue "..."` declaration for the Kafka topic

Includes the gilbarbara sprite preamble (`!define SPRITESURL .../v1.1/sprites`) AND `!include SPRITESURL/kafka.puml`, OR explicitly chooses the no-sprites variant with the Kafka topic labeled `queue "Kafka: ..."`
expectations.evidence: no-sprites variant: Kafka topic labeled with Kafka prefix

expectations.text: Every arrow has a label describing the protocol or payload (e.g. 'JSON events', 'Kafka consumer', 'JDBC sink')
expectations.evidence: every arrow labeled (JSON click events / Kafka consumer / INSERT JDBC)

expectations.text: At least 3 stages present (producer → Kafka → enrichment → warehouse, or equivalent decomposition)
